resolved_spec_source_spans.source_text:
17: ### RULE 02: NOT_AUTHORIZED when no AccessControl row exists
18: - SPEC: 5.1.5.2
19: - CONDITION: No row in AccessControl table for the InvokingID/MethodID combination, or the ACL has not been satisfied
20: - EXPECTED_STATUS: NOT_AUTHORIZED (0x01)
21: - IF_VIOLATED: fail — method should have been rejected
22: - EXAMPLE_TRAJECTORY: User attempts Set on a Locking range without authenticating an authority that satisfies the ACL
23:

137: ### RULE 18: Get returns only authorized columns (non-error omission)
138: - SPEC: 5.3.4.2.2
139: - CONDITION: Get is invoked; cells not permitted by ACL are omitted from results (not an error)
140: - EXPECTED_STATUS: SUCCESS, but restricted columns are omitted from result
141: - IF_VIOLATED: pass if columns are omitted; fail if unauthorized columns are returned
142: - EXAMPLE_TRAJECTORY: Anybody-authenticated Get on C_PIN_SID object — PIN column should be omitted
143:

353: ### RULE 46: Opal Write=True is mandatory; Write=False may or may not be supported
354: - SPEC: opal/4.1.1.2
355: - CONDITION: StartSession with Write=True SHALL be supported
356: - EXPECTED_STATUS: SUCCESS (SyncSession)
357: - IF_VIOLATED: fail — RW session support is mandatory
358: - EXAMPLE_TRAJECTORY: StartSession to AdminSP/LockingSP with Write=True and valid credentials
359:

282: ### RULE 37: Tries incremented on failed authentication
283: - SPEC: 5.3.4.1.1.2
284: - CONDITION: TryLimit is not 0; authentication fails
285: - EXPECTED_STATUS: Tries column incremented by 1
286: - IF_VIOLATED: fail if Tries not incremented
287: - EXAMPLE_TRAJECTORY: Wrong password attempt; check that Tries column increased
288:

17: ### RULE 02: NOT_AUTHORIZED when no AccessControl row exists
18: - SPEC: 5.1.5.2
19: - CONDITION: No row in AccessControl table for the InvokingID/MethodID combination, or the ACL has not been satisfied
20: - EXPECTED_STATUS: NOT_AUTHORIZED (0x01)
21: - IF_VIOLATED: fail — method should have been rejected
22: - EXAMPLE_TRAJECTORY: User attempts Set on a Locking range without authenticating an authority that satisfies the ACL
23:

502: ### RULE 65: Locking range ReadLocked/WriteLocked Set requires proper ACE
503: - SPEC: opal/4.3.1.6, 4.3.1.7
504: - CONDITION: Set ReadLocked on Locking_Range1 requires ACE_Locking_Range1_Set_RdLocked (Admins by default)
505: - EXPECTED_STATUS: NOT_AUTHORIZED if non-Admin authority; SUCCESS if Admin
506: - IF_VIOLATED: fail if unauthorized user can lock/unlock
507: - EXAMPLE_TRAJECTORY: Authenticate as User1, Set ReadLocked on Range1 — should fail unless ACE modified
508:

169: ### RULE 22: Same column multiple times in Set causes INVALID_PARAMETER
170: - SPEC: 5.3.4.2.6
171: - CONDITION: Including the same column multiple times in a single Set method invocation
172: - EXPECTED_STATUS: INVALID_PARAMETER
173: - IF_VIOLATED: fail — duplicate columns should be rejected
174: - EXAMPLE_TRAJECTORY: Set on Locking range with ReadLocked=True, ReadLocked=False in same invocation
175:

151: ### RULE 20: Get RowValues returned in Column table order
152: - SPEC: 5.3.3.6.2.2
153: - CONDITION: Column name-value pairs SHALL be returned in the order listed in the Column table
154: - EXPECTED_STATUS: SUCCESS with properly ordered result
155: - IF_VIOLATED: fail — response format violation
156: - EXAMPLE_TRAJECTORY: Get on Locking range object; verify column ordering in response
157: 
158: ---
159: 
160: ## CATEGORY 4: SET METHOD RULES (core/5.3.3.7.*, 5.3.4.2.6)
161:

509: ### RULE 66: GenKey requires Admin authority for Locking range keys
510: - SPEC: opal/4.3.1.7 (ACE_K_AES_*_Range*_GenKey)
511: - CONDITION: GenKey on K_AES key object requires Admins authority
512: - EXPECTED_STATUS: NOT_AUTHORIZED if not Admin; SUCCESS if Admin
513: - IF_VIOLATED: fail if non-Admin can generate keys
514: - EXAMPLE_TRAJECTORY: Authenticate as User1, invoke GenKey on K_AES_256_Range1_Key
515:
